items.markdown:
A **Himalayan salt wall** is `a decorative and wellness-focused installation made from natural pink salt bricks or tiles` . Frequently found in spas, saunas, and modern homes, these walls are valued for their soft amber glow and potential therapeutic effects, such as air purification and stress reduction.[[1]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20walls%20are%20touted,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[2]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/what-is-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=Use%20them%20indoors%20instead%20of,looking%20to%20expand%20beyond%20bricks?)[[3]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/pages/himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=As%20an%20industry%20leader%2C%20Sun,a%20reception%20and%20conference%20areas.)[[4]](https://himalayansaltbrick.com/himalayan-salt-wall-design-ideas/#:~:text=For%20a%20modern%20touch%2C%20use,%2C%20colors%2C%20and%20functional%20benefits.)

**Wellness & Aesthetic Benefits** 

- **Air Purification** : Himalayan salt is hygroscopic, meaning it attracts moisture from the air. When heated—typically by backlighting—this moisture evaporates, potentially releasing negative ions that help neutralize pollutants and allergens.
- **Respiratory Support** : Inhalation of salt particles (halotherapy) may help clear airways and reduce inflammation for those with asthma or allergies.
- **Mood Enhancement** : The warm, uniform light emitted through the translucent salt bricks mimics candlelight, which can boost serotonin levels and improve sleep quality.
- **Unique Decor** : Each hand-carved brick features distinct mineral-driven colors and patterns, making every wall a one-of-a-kind art piece.[[1]](https://www.saltability.com/pages/himalayan-salt-walls#:~:text=To%20counteract%20those%20excessive%20positive,through%20socially%2C%20environmentally%20responsible%20manufacturing.)[[2]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/why-himalayan-pink-salt-walls-are-good-for-your-health#:~:text=Air%20Purification%20Through%20Negative%20Ion,calming%20illumination%20which%20creates%20relaxation.)[[3]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/pages/himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=As%20an%20industry%20leader%2C%20Sun,a%20reception%20and%20conference%20areas.)[[4]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20walls%20are%20touted,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[5]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/himalayan-salt/how-to-use-salt-bricks-for-walls-to-improve-sauna-center#:~:text=One%20of%20the%20main%20reasons,the%20nose%20as%20previously%20experienced.)[[6]](https://vocal.media/humans/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-blocks-for-elegant-interior-design#:~:text=Many%20claim%20that%20Himalayan%20salt,is%20also%20a%20great%20concern.)[[7]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/products/white-himalayan-salt-wall-panel-6-bricks#:~:text=Benefits%20of%20Himalayan%20salt%20wall,phones%2C%20computers%2C%20TV's%2C%20etc)

**Product Recommendations & Pricing** 

You can purchase individual bricks for DIY projects or pre-assembled panels for easier installation.[[1]](https://www.amazon.ca/Natural-Himalayan-Bricks-Improvement-Therapy/dp/B0C3RV3JWR#:~:text=Additional%20details.%20A%20bundle%20of%20two%20identically,those%20who%20won't%20proceed%20without%20a%20sample.)[[2]](https://havenofheat.com/collections/sauna-himalayan-salt#:~:text=Salt%20Wall%20Panels%20Himalayan%20salt%20wall%20panels,that%20installs%20directly%20onto%20your%20sauna%20wall.)[[3]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=These%20panels%20start%20at%20approximately%20$1%2C000%20for,salt%20bricks%20present%20a%20more%20affordable%20alternative.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/himalayan-salt-decor-himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=Embrace%20the%20unique%20aesthetic%20of%20Himalayan%20Salt,rocks%20in%20a%20convenient%20and%20easy-to-install%20format.)

- **[[Scandia Himalayan Salt Wall Panels](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:13690341837031508712,headlineOfferDocid:15129564281050643949,productDocid:15129564281050643949,rds:LO_15129564281050643949%7CPROD_LO_15129564281050643949&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwidw7iP16KTAxV29rsIHcEGF5IQxa4PegQICBAD) ](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels)** : Features a patent-pending mounting system for easy installation. Available in pink or white salt, with or without integrated LED lighting.
	- **Price** : ~$225.00 – $425.00 depending on lighting options.
- **[Himalayan Salt Wall Kit (TouchAmerica)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462606108554208,imageDocid:2359112376494504798,gpcid:12928265854039936102,headlineOfferDocid:10505198016413126514,catalogid:17520652071847963304,productDocid:14204405472215948022&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwidw7iP16KTAxV29rsIHcEGF5IQxa4PegQICBAH)** : A compact kit designed to transform small spaces.
	- **Price** : ~$88.00 (Pink) – $110.00 (White).
- **[Himalayan Pink Salt Tiles (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Tiles-Sauna-Bricks-Decor/dp/B0DRR1CCM4)** : Ideal for larger DIY projects. A pack of 50 tiles covers approximately 10 square feet.
	- **Price** : Varies, but individual bricks often range from $20 to $50.
- **Cedar Sense Salt Wall Panels** : Specifically designed for saunas, these panels are removable for easy maintenance.
	- **Price** : ~~~$550.00~~~ $390.00 (29% off).[[1]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=$225.00%20USD,Quantity)[[2]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=This%20is%20an%20excellent%20option,method%20suited%20for%20your%20space.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7140153925007176577,catalogid:12751530502885551510,gpcid:5809168640582224961&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=Description%20%0A%20%20%20%0A%20%20,LED%20sheet%20to%20back%20light%20the%20panel.)[[5]](https://finnishsaunabuilders.com/products/scandia-himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=DESCRIPTION:,SPECIFICATIONS:)

**Installation & Maintenance** 

- **Location** : Choose a dry, well-ventilated indoor spot. **Avoid** bathrooms or outdoor areas where high humidity can cause the salt to "sweat" or dissolve.
- **Lighting** : Use low-heat LED strips behind the bricks to highlight their natural patterns and activate ion release without damaging the salt.
- **Mounting Methods**:
	- **Glue-Free** : Bricks are slotted into metal or wood frames for easy removal and repair.
	- **Adhesive** : Bricks are permanently fixed using salt-safe glue or specialized mortar.
- **Care** : Clean only with a soft, **dry cloth** . Never use water or abrasive cleaners, as they will degrade the salt surface.[[1]](https://sobaansalts.com/salt-wall-construction/#:~:text=Step%201%20%E2%80%93%20Prepare%20the%20Wall,wires%20and%20lights%20pre-end)[[2]](https://saltpur.co.za/himalayan-salt-wall-conctruction-installation-and-building-guide/#:~:text=What%20Are%20Negative%20Ions?,are%20released%20into%20the%20atmosphere.)[[3]](https://vocal.media/humans/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-blocks-for-elegant-interior-design#:~:text=Many%20claim%20that%20Himalayan%20salt,is%20also%20a%20great%20concern.)[[4]](https://buildsaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/how-to-make-a-himalayan-salt-wall-design-from-pink-salt-tiles-and-bricks#:~:text=The%20reasoning%20behind%20this%20is,Incorrect%20Placement%20of%20Tiles)[[5]](https://www.ittefaqsalt.com/salt-wall-construction/#:~:text=Get%20In%20Touch-,Building%20and%20Installation%20Instructions,different%20place%20without%20much%20hassle.)[[6]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=This%20is%20an%20excellent%20option,method%20suited%20for%20your%20space.)[[7]](https://buildsaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/build-a-stunning-himalayan-salt-wall-with-pink-salt-tiles#:~:text=The%20living%20room%20is%20key,them%20bright%20for%20day%20events.)[[8]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/why-himalayan-pink-salt-walls-are-good-for-your-health#:~:text=Air%20Purification%20Through%20Negative%20Ion,calming%20illumination%20which%20creates%20relaxation.)

Are you planning to build a **full accent wall** or would you prefer a **modular panel** for easier setup?
